guidance: Sustainable EBITDA margin guided 14-16% amid pricing and competition pressure.
Diversifying into IPP — operational assets 54 MW, ₹26cr FY26 revenue.
2.83 GWp book plus 36 GWp pipeline underpin continued strong topline growth.
insights: Unexecuted order book 2.83 GWp — 12-15 months of revenue visibility.
Bidding pipeline >36 GWp; recent wins 420/35/14 MWp ground-mount solar.
Q4 EBITDA margin 18.76%, above 14-16% guided band but below prior year.
concall.orderExecution: 2.83 GWp unexecuted book executes over next 12-15 months; large lower-margin utility contracts dominate.
